sg_weights._note: Quail Hollow: long (7535y) bentgrass course, hard difficulty. Over_200_fw is highest-weighted shotmaking band. APP and OTT both critical — Green Mile (16-18) demands elite iron play and length. ARG suppressed (chip-out situations less frequent on bermuda-adjacent layout).

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights — Quail Hollow has stable modern history at event_id 480 (Wells Fargo/Truist). Good sample size across 10+ editions.

course_history_note: Quail Hollow has hosted Wells Fargo/Truist Championship continuously. event_id 480 covers full modern history. No fallback needed.
course_notes: Par-72, 7535y. Bentgrass greens, stimp ~12.5. Hard difficulty (avg ~72.5). Famous Green Mile finish: 16 (par-3), 17 (par-4 drivable), 18 (par-4 with water left). OTT is critical to reach par-5s and set up approach angles. Bermuda-like rough complexity. Historical specialists: McIlroy (multiple wins, course record holder), Fowler, Rory-type bombers with precise iron play.
winner_archetype: Long bomber with elite iron play. Bentgrass putting helps those with good putting form. Green Mile survivability separates the field in final round — needs nerves and length simultaneously.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Individual BBI v8.5 rankings active. Phase 1 / THEMIS / OMNIA all run normally. Pool + DFS outputs published.
